'''Vorzyd IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Vorzyd system/Legends|Vorzyd system]]. All the [[Vorzydiak]]s on Vorzyd IV were dedicated to manufacturing products and were disdainful of fun and games.

The [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his apprentice, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], went to Vorzyd IV in [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and discovered that their monitoring systems were being sabotaged by the newest generation of Vorzyd IV, the [[Freelies]], who wanted to change their parents' "work-only" attitudes. They succeeded, and Vorzydiak culture improved as a result.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Threat Within]]'' {{1st}}
